treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient appears to have improved condition with absence of chest pain, shortness of breath, or lightheadedness post-operation.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for evaluation of slow heart rate.
Patient started on warfarin for atrial fibrillation.
